# bDescriptorType

**Instance Property**

The type of the descriptor.

## Declaration

```swift
uint8_t bDescriptorType;
```

## Discussion

For a list of possible values, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/iokit/tiousbdescriptortype].

## Getting the Descriptor Properties

- **bLength**: The size of the descriptor.
